# jellyfin_api_key (Resource)

Manages an API key in Jellyfin. API keys provide authentication tokens for external applications to access the Jellyfin API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jellyfin_api_key" "example" {
  app_name = "my-application"
}

output "api_key" {
  value     = jellyfin_api_key.example.access_token
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_name` (String) The application name for the API key.

### Read-Only

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) The generated access token (API key). This is set by Jellyfin upon creation.
